_comment: Hand-written CSL-JSON for publications that have no PMID and no DOI, so
there is nothing for PubMed or Crossref to look up. Without these records
the download-citation button has no data source and cannot be shown.
Key = the article's URL exactly as it appears in publications.md, or the
exact title if the entry has no link at all.
These records feed the RIS / BibTeX / EndNote / CSL-JSON downloads directly;
they are embedded in the page, so no network request is made for them.

https://global.oup.com/academic/product/.title: Randomized controlled trials and evidence-based practice

Randomized controlled trials and evidenc.title: Randomized controlled trials and evidence-based practice
